title: Billiam – “Asbestos & Me” & “Not The Boss”
author: Chris DeVille
summary:

The post Billiam – “Asbestos & Me” & “Not The Boss” appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
The prolific Australian DIY garage rocker Billiam is back today with an anxiously revved-up new single. "Asbestos & Me" is billed as the first track from the forthcoming Billiam album Fang The Sniper, which will someday be out via Erste Theke Tontraeger and BDK Records. In the meantime, the song is the A-side of a new 5" picture disc from Low Ambition Records, backed by "Not The Boss," which appears to be a non-album B-side. 

The synth-infused "Asbestos & Me" dashes forward with jittery livewire energy and hooks from every direction. "Not The Boss" slows things down just a smidge while continuing to deliver the goods. Hear both tracks below, and check out Camille Perry's video for "Asbestos & Me."

The "Asbestos & Me" b/w "Not The Boss" 5" picture disc is nearly sold out, so buy it while you still can at Bandcamp.
